assertions.description: Identified U1 as LDO with input_rail '__unnamed_1' (VPP via Schottky D1) and output_rail '__unnamed_0' (to LED indicator D2). Topology, lib_id, and neighbor extraction are all accurate.
21 total components (2 ICs, 10 caps, 1 Schottky diode, 1 LED, 2 resistors, 1 crystal, 1 switch, 3 connectors) match the design. Power rails +3.3V, GND, VPP correctly identified.
